chapter_title: About Dislike of Al Ihtiba' on

hadith_entries.text:
966. Narrated Sahl ibn Mo'az on the authority of his
father; 'The Prophet forbade the worshipper to do Al
'Ihtiba' on Friday while the imam is delivering the sermon.'
(At-Termizi).
Abu-Issa said; 'This Hadith is Hasan and a group people
of knowledge disliked that the worshipper does Al 'Ihtiba' on
Friday while the imam is delivering the sermon. Another
group out of them are Abdullah ibn Omar and others saw it is
permissible. This is the same view of Ahmed and Ishaq who
saw no harm in doing it.'
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
